base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of old_man_idle — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Cave Old Man — red-robed bearded elder. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cave Old Man — red-robed bearded elder; gives Link starting Wooden Sword in cave 1; appears in many caves with tips. Legendary line 'IT'S DANGEROUS TO GO ALONE!'
